## Summary

Describe the maintainer problem this change solves.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or usage changed

## Maintainer safety

- [ ] Default behavior works without secrets
- [ ] Untrusted PR, issue, diff, or release text is not executed or followed as instruction
- [ ] No automation merges, closes, labels, or edits remote state without explicit maintainer action
